title: Using custom GPTs
optimized_headline: Unlocking the Power of Custom GPTs: How They Transform Your Workflow
raw_excerpt: Learn how to build and use custom GPTs to automate workflows, maintain consistent outputs, and create purpose-built AI assistants.
raw_body: Learn how to build and use custom GPTs to automate workflows, maintain consistent outputs, and create purpose-built AI assistants.
speedrun: The latest insights on custom GPTs show how they can be tailored to automate workflows and ensure consistent outputs. Users can create specialized AI assistants that cater to specific tasks, enhancing efficiency. This development is crucial as it allows businesses and individuals to streamline operations and improve productivity across various sectors, from customer service to content creation.
why_it_matters: For businesses, custom GPTs could simplify repetitive tasks, saving time and resources for employees focused on higher-level work.
This trend suggests a shift towards more personalized AI solutions, indicating that companies are investing in tailored technology to meet specific needs.

lenses.eli12: Custom GPTs are like having a personal assistant that knows exactly how you like things done. They can help automate tasks and keep everything running smoothly. This is important for everyday people because it can save time and reduce stress in managing daily responsibilities.
lenses.pm: For product managers or founders, custom GPTs highlight a growing user need for personalized solutions that enhance efficiency. By automating workflows, businesses could lower operational costs and improve output quality. This means teams can focus on innovation rather than routine tasks.
lenses.engineer: From a technical perspective, custom GPTs allow for fine-tuning models to perform specific tasks or workflows. They can maintain consistent outputs by leveraging user-defined parameters and training data. This capability could lead to significant improvements in both speed and accuracy for various applications.
